title: Mars & the Solar-System Colonies
summary: The inhabited solar system of the record — Mars colonies human and otherwise, Bigfoot's blue tribe, and the settlement map from the Moon to Saturn.
markdown:
**Mars** appears in eleven sessions as the record's second address: not a dead planet but
a neighborhood. The colony map is stated plainly in the August 10, 2020 interview: *"And
the Colonies of Mars, of the Moon, and Saturn. And other Asteroids throughout the Solar
System, with Colonies from Earth"* — the [secret space program's](/lore/secret-space-program/)
settled solar system, running parallel to the public one.

Its residents are not all human, and not all expected. The
[Bigfoot teacher](/lore/bigfoot/) of the May 2020 session claims it for his own people:
*"The blue tribe, they are Space race, which is my tribe. We live on the Moon and we live
on Mars."* By the December 2025 session the roster has widened into the record's routine
cosmopolitanism: *"interacting with other extraterrestrial colony throughout your planet.
Moon, Mars, Venus."*

Where the [Moon](/lore/loc-moon-base/) got the record's infrastructure (the Lunar
Operations Command), Mars gets its settlement claims — colonies, jumpgate connections,
and populations layered over eras. In the record's solar system, the red planet's
emptiness is the cover story.
